summary: Completed testing of Multi-Engine Trading Management System iteration 18. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Boss Gate 86%, Trade Size $10, Real Kitty display, countdown timer, market filtering (closed markets hidden), WR sorting, LIVE badges, BUY/SELL/X buttons, Day/Week/Month stats in Command Center.

issues: Change % column shows +0.00% for most markets - may need to verify Yahoo data feed is updating

passed_tests: GET /api/scheduler/stats returns period stats with trades > 0 (12,509 trades seeded)
Engines have yahoo_change_pct field with real percentages (e.g., 2.5% not 250%)
Frontend: Market Perf Grid shows only open markets (42 visible)
Frontend: BUY/SELL buttons visible for markets without positions
Frontend: LIVE badge shows on RUSSELL with open LIVE position
Frontend: X close button visible for open position
Frontend: Open Positions panel shows RUSSELL BUY position with P&L
Frontend: Command Center shows Day/Week/Month stats (12,508 trades, 42.9% WR)
Frontend: Supervisor crews visible with P&L

boss_gate_86_percent.description: Header shows GATE 86% with -5/+5 adjustment buttons

trade_size_10_usd.description: Header shows TRADE $ $10 with -5/+5 adjustment buttons

real_kitty_display.description: Header shows REAL KITTY $489.86 with P&L and COMM

countdown_timer.description: Header shows countdown timer (12:08:54 format) next to trades

closed_markets_hidden.description: Only 42 open markets shown (European + crypto), US/Asian markets hidden

markets_sorted_by_wr.description: Markets sorted by WR descending (BTC 71%, IBEX 71%, etc.)

live_badge_on_positions.description: RUSSELL row shows LIVE badge for open LIVE position

x_close_button.description: X button visible on RUSSELL row to close open position

buy_sell_buttons.description: BUY/SELL buttons visible on rows without open positions

change_percent_colors.description: Change % column visible but showing +0.00% for most markets (may be stale data)

day_week_month_stats.description: Command Center shows DAY/WEEK/MONTH with 12,508 trades, -$44.54 P&L, 42.9% WR

open_positions_panel.description: Shows RUSSELL BUY LIVE position with entry/current price and P&L

action_items: MINOR: Verify Yahoo data feed is updating change_pct values (most show +0.00%)
critical_code_review_comments: Boss Gate correctly defaults to 0.86 (86%) at line 1305 of fastapi_app.py
Trade Size correctly defaults to $10 at line 1328 of fastapi_app.py
Manual trade endpoint correctly deducts from real_kitty and sets mode=LIVE
MarketPerfGrid.jsx correctly filters closed markets using getMarketStatus()
MarketPerfGrid.jsx correctly sorts by WR descending
yahoo_change_pct values are real percentages (not multiplied by 100 again)
Period stats seeded from engines on startup via seed_period_stats_from_engines()
seed_data_creation: None - system uses live data from 74 SIM engines
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working: (1) Boss Gate 86% default with +/-5% buttons, (2) Trade Size $10 default with +/-5 buttons, (3) Manual trades are LIVE mode and deduct from real kitty, (4) Closed markets hidden from UI (only open markets + crypto visible), (5) Markets sorted by WR descending, (6) LIVE badge shows on rows with LIVE positions, (7) X close button appears when position is open, (8) Day/Week/Month stats seeded from engines (12,509 trades). Current open position: RUSSELL BUY LIVE at $10. Real Kitty: $489.86. BROKER_MODE=mock. cTrader execution is MOCKED.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/scheduler/stats: Returns daily/weekly/monthly period stats with trades > 0
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/scheduler/countdown: Returns Adelaide timezone countdown with period_stats
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/engines/summary: Returns 74 engines with yahoo_change_pct and promotion.phase

existing_open_position.note: DO NOT close - user is sensitive about kitty manipulation
